justification: The policy states that Gemini will only process precise location data from your device 'in accordance with your consent' (L0200). Since the scenario specifies the user has not granted device or browser location permission, the policy prohibits collecting precise device location without explicit consent. Additionally, the policy clarifies that even if 'exact location' settings are disabled, Gemini may still receive precise location data from other Google services like Google Maps, but this is not explicitly permitted without user authorization.

source_excerpts.quote: In accordance with your consent, Gemini will process precise location data from your device.
Gemini will always collect your location data to provide answers closely related to your query.

quote_verification.model_quote: In accordance with your consent, Gemini will process precise location data from your device.
quote_verification.policy_quote: 在征得你的同意后，Gemini 应用还会处理来自你设备的精确位置数据。例如，Gemini 应用可以根据 你的精确位置信息，更准确地回答“最近的咖啡馆在哪里？”之类的问题。即使 Google 应用中的“精确 位置”设置处于关闭状态，Gemini 仍可能会从其他 Google 服务（例如 Google 地图）接收精确位置数 据。

quote_verification.model_quote: Gemini will always collect your location data to provide answers closely related to your query.
quote_verification.policy_quote: 当你使用 Gemini 应用时，系统始终会收集你的位置数据，以便 Gemini 应用根据你的提问提供紧密相 关的回答。例如，为了回答“天气怎么样？”这类问题，Gemini 应用需要知道你的位置信息。
